title: jasminum humile f. pubigerum
intro: Jasminum humile f. pubigerum, also known as dwarf or climbing jasmine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum humile f. pubigerum include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, or they can be added to skincare products to take advantage of their antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
